query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.department, s.totalSales, s.totalPoints,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as vendas_reais,
  s.totalSales - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as diferenca_vendas
FROM sellers s WHERE s.active = true ORDER BY diferenca_vendas DESC, s.name
command:

  s.totalSales - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as diferenca_vendas
